fantasy: Epic high fantasy masterpiece. Sweeping, majestic landscapes bathed in golden hour light. Intricate medieval armor and weaponry with realistic wear and scratches. Organic, flowing elven architecture or imposing stone fortresses with mossy textures. Rich, naturalistic color palette with deep greens, vibrant golds, and earthy browns. Cinematic composition with depth of field, ray traced reflections on metal surfaces.
xianxia: Ethereal Chinese immortal cultivation aesthetic. Celestial palaces floating amidst sea of clouds with volumetric lighting. Characters in flowing, multi-layered Hanfu robes with intricate silk embroidery and subsurface scattering. Mystical Qi energy effects (gold, azure, violet) with particle details. Ancient Taoist symbolism. Dreamlike, soft-focus atmosphere with a sense of transcendence, jade-like skin textures.
wuxia: Gritty and dynamic Chinese martial arts cinema style. High-contrast lighting, dramatic shadows. Bamboo forests with detailed leaf textures, mist-covered mountains, or bustling ancient inns with weathered wood. Action-oriented composition emphasizing movement and fluidity. Textural details on rough fabrics and cold steel weapons. Muted earth tones with splashes of crimson or jade, film grain.
demonic_cultivation: Dark, gothic Chinese cultivation fantasy. Oppressive atmosphere with heavy shadows and fog. haunting green ghost fires, resentment energy manifesting as black smoke. Stark contrast between pale skin and dark, flowing robes. Blood-red accents. Necrotic aesthetic with bone and talisman motifs.
scifi: Hard science fiction realism. Sterile, high-tech environments with cold, clinical lighting (blue, white, grey). Holographic interfaces with scanlines, complex machinery with visible wear, grease, and scratches. utilitarian spacesuit designs with realistic fabric textures. Vastness of space or claustrophobic station interiors. Sharp focus, high detail, ray traced reflections on glass and metal.
cyberpunk: Neon-noir dystopia. Rain-slicked streets reflecting vibrant pink, cyan, and purple neon signs (screen space reflections). Dense urban sprawl, towering mega-structures blocking the sky. Characters with visible cybernetic enhancements, chrome skin, and glowing circuitry. Gritty, high-contrast aesthetic with a mix of high-tech and low-life, wet pavement textures, volumetric fog.
horror: Cosmic horror and dread. Unsettling, non-Euclidean geometry. Dim, flickering lighting creating deep, abyssal shadows. Textures of slime, decay, rust, and visceral gore. Color palette of bruised purples, sickly greens, and deep blacks. Composition that evokes isolation and insignificance. Grainy, film-noir quality, chromatic aberration.
silent_hill: Psychological horror. Thick, suffocating fog obscuring vision. Decaying industrial environments, rust-covered metal, peeling paint. Grotesque, distorted humanoid figures. Desaturated, sepia-toned or cold blue color grading. Uncanny valley effect. Sense of nightmare logic.
resident_evil: Bio-organic survival horror. Claustrophobic corridors, visceral gore and body horror. Wet, slick textures of blood and viscera. Dim, directional lighting (flashlights). mutated creatures with excessive teeth/eyes. Dilapidated mansions or high-tech labs gone wrong.
zombie: Post-apocalyptic grit. Ruined urban landscapes reclaimed by nature or decay. Hordes of shambling undead. Makeshift weapons and armor. Grimy, dirt-stained characters. High contrast, desaturated look with emphasis on textures of rot and destruction.
mystery: Classic Noir detective style. High-contrast chiaroscuro lighting (venetian blind shadows). Rain-soaked city streets at night. Smoke-filled rooms. Vintage 1940s fashion (trench coats, fedoras). muted color palette with sepia or black and white tones. Focus on clues and facial expressions.
intrigue: Opulent political thriller. Candlelit palace chambers with deep, rich shadows. Luxurious fabrics (velvet, silk) and jewelry. Subtle facial expressions conveying hidden agendas. Warm, golden lighting contrasting with cold, blue moonlight. Composition emphasizing power dynamics and secrecy.
modern_romance: Contemporary cinematic romance. Soft, flattering lighting (diffused window light, warm practicals). Cozy, intimate urban settings (cafes, apartments, rain-streaked windows). Focus on emotional connection, eye contact, and subtle body language. Warm, inviting color palette (pastels, creams).
ceo: High-end luxury aesthetic. Sleek, modern architecture (glass, steel, marble). expensive designer suits and evening gowns. City skylines at night. Cool, sophisticated lighting. Symbolism of power, wealth, and dominance. Sharp, clean lines.
entertainment: Glitz and glamour. Blinding stage lights, lens flares. vibrant, saturated colors. High fashion, flawless makeup. Crowds, paparazzi flashes. Energetic, dynamic composition. polished, magazine-cover quality.
esports: Cyber-sport intensity. Dark rooms illuminated by RGB LED lighting. Focus on screens, peripherals, and intense concentration. Team jerseys, logos. Dynamic angles, energetic atmosphere.
palace_drama: Sumptuous ancient Chinese court. Intricate architectural details (lacquered wood, gold leaf). elaborate costumes with heavy embroidery. heavily stylized makeup. Symmetry in composition. Rich reds, golds, and deep blues. Atmosphere of stifling tradition and hidden danger.
ancient_romance: Poetic historical romance. Soft, ethereal lighting. Cherry blossoms, willow trees, moonlit gardens. Flowing fabrics in wind. Gentle, melancholic atmosphere. Water color or ink wash painting influence.
republican: 1920s Shanghai glamour. Art Deco architecture. Qipaos/Cheongsams, western suits. Jazz clubs, vintage cars. Smoky, nostalgic atmosphere. Sepia tones mixed with vibrant nightlife colors.
survival: Desperate realism. Harsh environments (scorching sun, freezing snow). Worn, tattered clothing. Scavenged gear. Focus on physical exhaustion, dirt, sweat, and survival tools. stark, natural lighting.
infinite_flow: Surreal, shifting realities. Juxtaposition of disparate elements (e.g., modern tech in ancient ruins). Unsettling, dream-like transitions. Visual glitches or distortions. High tension.
system_stream: Gamified reality. HUD overlays (health bars, minimaps) integrated into the world. glowing loot drops. digital particle effects. Sharp, clean visuals with high contrast.
return_strong: Dramatic transformation. Before/after contrast. Aura of power (gold, white). Shocked reactions of bystanders. Center-frame composition emphasizing dominance.
long_aotian: Over-the-top grandeur. Exaggerated perspectives. Protagonist surrounded by divine light or aura. Subservient crowds. Symbols of ultimate authority (dragons, thrones).
villain_op: Charismatic darkness. Elegant, sharp features. Sinister smirk. Dark, regal clothing. Shadows seeming to obey the character. Low-angle shots emphasizing superiority.
minecraft: Voxel-based, blocky aesthetic. Pixelated textures. Bright, vibrant colors. Cubic landscapes. Distinctive square geometry for all objects and characters. Ray tracing enabled for realistic lighting on blocky surfaces.
dark_souls: Gothic dark fantasy with FromSoftware's oppressive atmosphere. Towering decrepit architecture, perpetual twilight, intricate knight armor designs, monstrous boss silhouettes, bonfire warmth against overwhelming darkness, melancholic beauty in decay. High contrast, desaturated colors with deep blacks.
elden_ring: Expansive dark fantasy merging Souls aesthetics with open-world grandeur. Erdtree golden light, shattered divine beings, hybrid creature designs, ruined grandeur of the Lands Between, Miyazaki's signature interconnected world design. Painterly landscapes with epic scale.
witcher: Dark Slavic fantasy with CD Projekt Red's distinctive style. Muted earth tones punctuated by vibrant monster designs, medieval Polish-inspired architecture, dynamic sword combat poses, harsh Eastern European landscapes, supernatural elements with bioluminescent effects. Realistic leather and metal textures.
elder_scrolls: High fantasy adventure. Diverse races, magic, dragons. Nordic or diverse landscapes. Vibrant colors, magical effects, and detailed armor designs.
monster_hunter: Capcom's hunting aesthetic. Massive creature designs with distinct silhouettes, armor crafted from monster parts, lush ecosystem environments, dynamic combat poses, palico companion charm. Vibrant, saturated colors and detailed textures.
terraria: 2D pixel art style translated to 3D depth. Colorful, adventurous, crafting-focused. Vibrant colors, magical effects, and distinct biomes.
warframe: Organic sci-fi bio-armor. Sleek, metallic, flowing designs. Fast motion, energy trails. High-tech environments with distinct architectural styles.
lol: Stylized fantasy. Distinct character silhouettes. Magic effects. Runeterra lore elements. Vibrant colors and dynamic compositions.
wow: Stylized, exaggerated fantasy. Big shoulder pads, glowing weapons. Distinct racial architecture. Vibrant colors and epic scale.
stellaris: Grand space strategy. Nebulas, star systems, alien fleets. Cosmic scale. High-tech ships and stations.
dnd: Classic high fantasy tabletop aesthetic. Diverse party compositions, iconic monster designs (beholders, dragons, mind flayers), dungeon environments with torchlight, magical spell effects with distinct schools of magic, heroic adventure poses.
helldivers: Satirical sci-fi war. Explosions, bugs/bots, capes, orbital strikes. Chaotic action. High contrast, gritty textures.
l4d: Cinematic zombie shooter. Hordes, safe rooms, urban decay. Green/blue tint. High contrast, gritty textures.
dead_space: Industrial sci-fi horror. Engineering suits, necromorphs, blood, flashing lights. High contrast, gritty textures.
mo_dao_zu_shi: Xianxia with gothic elements. Flutes, talismans, resentment energy. Lan/Jiang clan aesthetics. High contrast, desaturated colors with deep blacks.
tian_guan_ci_fu: Heavenly and Ghostly aesthetic. Butterflies, red strings, temples. Ethereal beauty. Soft, dreamlike lighting.
harry_potter: Warm, magical aesthetic inspired by Chris Columbus and Alfonso Cuarón's films. Gothic Victorian architecture with whimsical magical elements, candlelit Hogwarts interiors, autumnal British countryside. Rich jewel tones (Gryffindor red/gold, Slytherin green/silver), soft diffused magical lighting.
battle_through_heavens: Flaming cultivation. Alchemists, heavy swords, energy wings. Vibrant colors and dynamic compositions.
soul_land: Spirit avatars. Glowing rings. Academy battles. Distinct spirit forms. Vibrant colors and dynamic compositions.
xian_ni: Ruthless, dark cultivation. Blood, slaughter, cold determination. High contrast, desaturated colors with deep blacks.
swallowed_star: Future martial arts. Monsters, advanced tech, ruins. High contrast, gritty textures.
frieren: Melancholic, peaceful fantasy. Soft colors, journey themes, subtle magic. Painterly landscapes with epic scale.
game_of_thrones: Gritty medieval realism with HBO's signature dark, desaturated color palette. Practical armor and costume design, Baroque-inspired castle interiors, harsh northern lighting for winterfell scenes, Mediterranean warmth for southern kingdoms. Emphasis on political drama through intimate close-ups.
patriotism: Heroic, nationalistic. Flags, soldiers, determination. Warm, inspiring light. High contrast, dynamic compositions.
lord_of_the_rings: Epic fantasy cinematography inspired by Peter Jackson's Middle-earth films. Sweeping New Zealand landscapes, warm golden hour lighting, practical medieval armor and weapons, organic elven architecture with flowing curves, dark volcanic Mordor aesthetic for evil elements. Naturalistic color grading with rich greens and golds.
star_wars: George Lucas's space opera aesthetic. Lived-in future with worn technology, Art Deco meets WWII design, dramatic lightsaber lighting, desert Tatooine warmth vs Death Star cold steel, John Williams-inspired dramatic compositions.
blade_runner: Ridley Scott's neo-noir cyberpunk. Rain-soaked neon cityscapes, Vangelis-inspired atmospheric haze, Art Deco retrofuturism, stark contrast between corporate towers and street-level decay, melancholic artificial humanity.
cyberpunk_2077: CD Projekt Red's Night City aesthetic. Hyper-saturated neon lighting, chrome and flesh augmentation, corporate megastructures, street-level punk rebellion, braindance visual distortion, kitsch meets violence.
dune: Denis Villeneuve's architectural sci-fi. Brutalist desert fortress design, ornithopter organic technology, Fremen stillsuit practicality, sandworm massive scale, muted earth tones with spice-orange highlights, Middle Eastern influences.
mass_effect: BioWare's sleek space opera. Clean sci-fi interfaces, diverse alien species with distinct visual identities, N7 military aesthetics, Citadel white-and-blue architecture, biotic power visual effects in blue/purple.
halo: Bungie/343's military sci-fi. MJOLNIR armor iconic silhouette, Covenant purple-plasma technology vs UNSC military green, Forerunner geometric architecture, ringworld scale, dramatic Xbox green lighting.
lovecraft: Cosmic horror aesthetic. Impossible non-Euclidean geometry, tentacled elder things, 1920s New England settings, deep sea abyssal dread, madness-inducing alien vistas, ink-wash shadow effects.
uncharted: Naughty Dog's adventure aesthetic. Indiana Jones-inspired globe-trotting, ancient ruins with golden artifacts, dynamic action compositions, vibrant jungle and desert environments, charismatic treasure hunter charm.
tomb_raider: Classic archaeological adventure. Ancient tomb environments with trap-filled corridors, Lara Croft's iconic dual pistol silhouette, jungle ruins reclaimed by nature, supernatural artifacts glowing with power.
assassins_creed: Ubisoft's historical parkour. Iconic hood silhouette against historical cityscapes, hidden blade close-up details, synchronization viewpoints overlooking cities, DNA memory visual effects, dual timeline visual distinction.
god_of_war: Santa Monica's mythological action. Greek then Norse mythology rendered brutal, Kratos's ashen skin and red tattoo, Leviathan Axe frost effects, massive scale god battles, father-son journey emotional weight.
sekiro: FromSoftware's Sengoku-era Japan. Precise katana combat poses, shinobi grappling hook traversal, Japanese castle architecture, yokai and Buddhist mythology, cherry blossom beauty against brutal violence.
ghost_of_tsushima: Sucker Punch's samurai aesthetic. Kurosawa-inspired black and white mode, autumn leaves and wind particles, traditional samurai armor, Mongol invasion brutality, haiku moment tranquility, standoff dramatic tension.
genshin_impact: miHoYo's anime open-world. Bright cel-shaded characters, elemental burst visual effects (pyro/hydro/electro/etc), Teyvat's diverse region aesthetics, gacha character design appeal, anime action poses.
final_fantasy: Square Enix's JRPG grandeur. Amano-inspired character designs, summon beast spectacles, crystal motifs, airship steampunk technology, elaborate costume design, dramatic limit break poses.
persona: Atlus's stylish JRPG. Bold red/black/white color scheme, Shigenori Soejima character designs, Persona awakening dramatic reveals, Tokyo urban environments, calendar UI aesthetics, social link intimacy.
nier: Yoko Taro's philosophical action. Android elegant gothic lolita design, Machine Lifeform crude-cute contrast, post-apocalyptic overgrown beauty, bullet hell visual patterns, 2B's iconic silhouette.
zelda: Nintendo's adventure aesthetic. Cel-shaded Hyrule, Master Sword iconic design, varied dungeon environments, Link's tunic silhouette, Sheikah technology blue glow, Breath of the Wild open-world wonder.
bioshock: Irrational Games' retro-dystopia. Rapture's Art Deco underwater ruins, Columbia's American exceptionalism propaganda, Big Daddy diving suit horror, plasmid power visual effects, would you kindly philosophical dread.
female_growth: Inspirational and grounded. Warm, natural lighting emphasizing resilience and growth. Soft focus on character expressions. Contemporary urban or pastoral settings. Color palette shifting from muted to vibrant as the character grows.
war_god: Epic military grandeur. High contrast, gritty battlefield textures. Aura of invincibility (gold or crimson energy). imposing silhouettes against smoke and fire. Dynamic action angles.
love_after_marriage: Intimate domestic romance. Cozy, warm interior lighting. Soft textures of home decor. Focus on subtle gestures of affection. Gentle, comforting atmosphere.
angst: Melancholic and emotional. Cold, desaturated tones (blues, greys). Rain, snow, or overcast skies. High contrast lighting emphasizing isolation. Visual metaphors of separation and longing.
reunion: Emotional warmth and relief. Golden hour lighting. Soft focus backgrounds. Focus on embrace and tearful smiles. Atmosphere of nostalgia and hope.
farming: Pastoral tranquility. Lush green fields, golden sunlight. Detailed textures of crops and soil. Simple, rustic architecture. Bright, cheerful color palette.
son_in_law: Underdog rising. Contrast between humble beginnings and hidden power. Urban settings with a mix of gritty streets and luxurious interiors. Dramatic lighting shifts.
white_moonlight: Ethereal and nostalgic. Soft, dreamlike glow. Pale, cool colors (white, silver, pale blue). Idealized beauty. Atmosphere of longing and distant memory.
yandere: Psychological horror romance. Sharp contrast between cute/innocent visuals and disturbing elements (blood, weapons, shadows). Intense, unblinking eye contact. Claustrophobic composition.
cs_student: Modern academic tech. University campus settings, computer labs with screen glow. Casual hoodies and backpacks. Clean, bright lighting. Code snippets or digital overlays.
rough_guy: Gritty masculinity. Industrial or street settings. Harsh lighting, deep shadows. Textures of leather, denim, and scars. Intense, brooding atmosphere.
wife_chasing: Determined romantic pursuit. Dynamic composition emphasizing movement. Urban cityscapes or travel settings. Mix of regretful cool tones and hopeful warm tones.
special_forces: Tactical military realism. Night vision green, camouflage textures. High-tech gear details. Tense, stealthy atmosphere. Urban or jungle combat environments.
body_swap: Comedic or dramatic duality. Visual cues of mismatched personalities (e.g., tough guy in feminine pose). Mirrors and reflections. Bright, energetic lighting.
industry_elite: Corporate luxury. High-rise offices with city views. Sleek suits, glass and steel architecture. Cool, professional lighting. Atmosphere of ambition and power.
mutual_redemption: Healing and connection. Transition from cold/dark to warm/light. Intimate two-shots. Soft, comforting textures. Symbolism of mending or growth.
sweet_pet: Sugary sweet romance. Pastel color palette (pink, baby blue). Soft, fluffy textures. Sparkles and bubbles. Cheerful, high-key lighting.
wild_youth: Rebellious and energetic. Vibrant, saturated colors. School uniforms or street fashion. Dynamic movement. Sun-drenched classrooms or neon-lit streets.
rebirth_revenge: Dramatic vindication. High contrast lighting (chiaroscuro). Sharp, determined expressions. Visual motifs of time or mirrors. Dark, rich colors (crimson, black, gold).
flash_marriage: Fast-paced modern romance. City lights, wedding rings, legal documents. Mix of surprise and intimacy. Bright, clean visuals.
family_ethics: Domestic drama. Realistic home interiors. Tense or warm lighting depending on the scene. Focus on group dynamics and facial expressions. Muted, natural colors.
divine_doctor: Traditional medicine meets fantasy. Herbs, acupuncture needles, glowing energy. Serene clinics or ancient apothecaries. Soft, healing light.
cute_pet: Adorable animal focus. Low angles (pet perspective). Soft fur textures. Bright, sunny lighting. Cozy environments.
hidden_identity: Mystery and duality. Masks, shadows, reflections. Contrast between public persona and true self. Noir-inspired lighting.
wealthy_family: Old money opulence. Mansions, gardens, antique furniture. Rich textures (velvet, silk, mahogany). Warm, golden lighting. Formal composition.
cs_grad_journey: Career growth. Office environments, coding screens, city skylines. Transition from student casual to professional attire. Bright, optimistic lighting.
same_sex_love: Tender and authentic. Focus on emotional intimacy. Soft, romantic lighting. varied settings from campus to city. Inclusive and respectful representation.
delta_force: Elite military action. Tactical gear, desert or urban combat. Dust, smoke, explosions. High contrast, gritty realism.
warhammer_40k: Grimdark sci-fi gothic. Massive pauldrons, gothic architecture in space, skulls, purity seals. Grimy industrial textures. Dark, oppressive atmosphere with muzzle flashes.
ninja_gaiden: High-speed ninja action. Ryu Hayabusa's sleek suit. Urban nights or ancient temples. Motion blur, blood splashes. Sharp, dynamic angles.
expedition_33: Fantasy adventure. lush landscapes, ancient ruins. Party dynamics. Bright, adventurous lighting.
detroit_become_human: Neo-noir sci-fi. Android LEDs, holographic interfaces. Clean, futuristic Detroit. Rain, neon. Emotional close-ups.
scum_villain: Meta-wuxia comedy/drama. Green and black color scheme. Fan/system interfaces. Mix of traditional xianxia and modern gaming elements.
desolate_era: Grand xianxia scale. Massive beasts, sword formations. Elemental magic. Vast, ancient landscapes.
mortals_journey: Grounded cultivation. Herbal gardens, simple robes, magical tools. Realistic progression. Earthy tones.
shepherd_of_gods: Mythological fantasy. Gods, demons, ancient ruins. Vibrant, surreal colors. Epic scale.
infinite_sequence: Sci-fi horror mystery. Asylums, laboratories. Surreal imagery. Cold, clinical lighting mixed with gore.
kamen_rider: Tokusatsu hero. Insect motifs, transformation belts, explosions. Suit actors in dynamic poses. Bright, saturated colors.
slay_gods_hospital: Urban fantasy asylum. Modern hospital setting with mythological twists. Gods in patient garb. Surreal, psychological horror elements.
spartacus: Brutal ancient Rome. Gladiatorial arenas, blood, sand. Muscular physiques. High contrast, warm, sweaty lighting.
saint_seiya: Cosmic fantasy armor. Shining constellations. Greek ruins. Bright, metallic colors (gold, silver, bronze). Energy blasts.

lord_of_the_mysteries: Victorian steampunk Lovecraft. Top hats, monocles, tarot cards. Foggy London-esque streets. Tentacles, madness. Grey, crimson, and gold palette.

zhui_wei: Obsessive pursuit. Car crashes. Broken glass. Dark romance.
ying_di: Acting rivalry. Movie sets. Awards ceremonies. Spotlights.
quan_zhi_gao_shou: Esports glory. Internet cafes. Avatars. Keyboard actions. Glory game UI.

tai_feng_yan: Spy thriller. Stormy weather. Surveillance. Hidden agendas.
chen_zhou: Mental illness drama. Hospitals, hallucinations. Boat on water. Healing.
jun_qu_da_yuan: Military compound. Uniforms. Drills. Disciplined life.
sheng_chong_ju_xing: Rebirth stardom. Red carpets. Magazine covers. Glitz.
jiang_jin_jiu: Epic war politics. Cavalry, archery. Maps. Ce'an and Lanzhou.
huang_ye_zhi_chun: Wilderness survival. Tents, campfires. Nature. Rough romance.
sang_bing_da_xue: Zombie university. Dorms, cafeterias. Improvised weapons. Youth survival.
chuan_cheng_zuo_jing: Transmigration drama. Acting. Scripts. Identity crisis.
jia_gei_bao_jun: Tyrant romance. Palaces. Fear to love. Sweet moments.
fan_pai_shi_zun: Master-disciple angst. Punishment, redemption. White robes. Blood.
luan_shi_tong_lu: Wartime companionship. Ruins, smoke. Shared hardships. Hope.
li_hai_le_wo_de_yuan_shi_ren: Primitive survival. Stone tools. Hunting. Tribal life.
qie_wei_you_xi: Identity theft thriller. Mirrors, masks. Psychological tension.
dao_mu_bi_ji: Tomb raiding. Flashlights. Ancient coffins. Monsters. Notebooks.
gui_chui_deng: Grave robbing. Compasses. Candles. Curses. Supernatural beasts.
da_wang_rao_ming: Urban cultivation comedy. Distress points. Stars. Night markets.
shi_shang_zui_qiang_zhui_xu: Business war wuxia. Abacus, ledgers. Silk trade. Witty dialogue.
xiu_zhen_liao_tian_qun: Chat group cultivation. Smartphones. Tractors. Modern meets magic.
wang_you_zhi_jin_zhan_fa_shi: VRMMO melee mage. Staffs, muscles. Game UI. Arena battles.
quan_qiu_gao_wu: Martial arts academy. Vitality blood. Dungeons. High energy.
dang_ge_fa_shi_nao_ge_ming: Magical industrial revolution. Factories. Magic circles. Science meets fantasy.
yuan_shi_zhan_ji: Prehistoric totem warriors. Beasts. Stone cities. Elemental powers.
tian_qi_yu_bao: Urban superpowers. Weather effects. Rain, lightning. Daily life.
ye_de_ming_ming_shu: Cyberpunk transmigrator. Mechanical limbs. Inner world. Time countdowns.
san_ti: Hard sci-fi. Three suns. VR game suits. Droplets. Cosmic sociology.
chong_sheng_zhi_si_shui_liu_nian: 90s nostalgia. Old bicycles. Cassette tapes. Economic reform.
man_chao_wen_wu_dou_neng_ting_dao_wo_de_: Mind reading comedy. Court assemblies. Thought bubbles. Awkward faces.
qiang_zhe_shi_zen_yang_lian_cheng_de: Soviet steel. Revolution. Determination. Cold winter.
gui_mie_zhi_ren: Demon slayer. Breathing styles. Katanas. Wisteria flowers. Taisho era.
zhui_xu: Historical business. Cloth dyeing. Poetry. River towns.
romance_of_tiger_and_rose: Script world. City of Women. Rose motifs. Comedy.
gamification: Survival game aesthetic. Floating blue system windows, health bars over heads. Contrast between ruined reality and digital overlays. Glowing loot drops, pixelated glitches in the real world. Tense, high-action composition.
timeloop: Psychological thriller loop. Visual repetition with subtle differences. Clocks, hourglasses, deja vu imagery. Fractured mirrors reflecting different timelines. Desaturated, anxious atmosphere with sudden bursts of clarity.
myth_revival: Epic modern mythology. Giant ancient gods manifesting over modern skylines. Glowing runes on skyscrapers. Contrast between concrete jungle and divine light. Atmosphere of awe and impending doom. Cinematic scale.
rough_man_soldier: Gritty military romance. Border outposts, desert storms. Tactical gear mixed with casual wear. Warm, golden hour lighting emphasizing dust and sweat. Intense eye contact, protective body language. Rugged, masculine aesthetic.
rough_man_police: Neo-noir crime romance. Rain-slicked city streets, flashing police lights (red and blue). Smoky interrogation rooms. Leather jackets, guns, badges. High contrast lighting, shadows hiding danger. Gritty, realistic textures.
rough_man_special_forces: Elite tactical action. Jungle camouflage or urban ruins. Night vision hues, laser sights. Muscular silhouettes, sweat-drenched skin. Tense, explosive atmosphere with moments of quiet intimacy.
rough_man_armed_police: Disaster relief heroism. Floodwaters, earthquake ruins. Mud-stained uniforms, orange life vests. Rain, fire. Warm, hopeful lighting amidst destruction. Focus on strength and reliability.
villainess_rebirth: High-society revenge. Luxurious ballrooms, diamonds, red wine. Sharp, dangerous beauty. Smirks, side-eyes. Visuals of mirrors breaking or masks falling off. Rich, saturated colors (crimson, gold, black).
hidden_heir: Understated luxury. Contrast between shabby surroundings and expensive details (a watch, a car). Face-slapping moments. Visuals of transformation. Cool, confident atmosphere.
sweet_pet_healing: Soft, fluffy romance. Warm, pastel colors. Cozy interiors (blankets, hot cocoa). Sunlight filtering through curtains. Gentle touches, smiling eyes. Atmosphere of absolute safety and comfort.
revenge_counterattack: Dark vengeance. Rain, blood, broken glass. Cold, steel-blue lighting. Lonely silhouettes. Visuals of rising from ashes. Intense, sharp focus.
cyberpunk_cultivation: Taoist cyberpunk. Neon bagua diagrams, holographic talismans. Robes made of synthetic materials. Flying swords leaving data trails. High-tech temples. Pink, cyan, and gold color palette.
steampunk_victorian: Brass and steam. Gears, clockwork mechanisms. Victorian fashion with goggles and mechanical limbs. Sepia tones, fog, gaslight. intricate mechanical details.
disaster_survival: Frozen/Scorched earth. Icicles, snowstorms or cracked earth, heat waves. Makeshift shelters. Survival gear. Desaturated, harsh lighting. Atmosphere of isolation and struggle.
infinite_loop_survival: Liminal space horror. Endless corridors, identical rooms. Subtle wrongness (uncanny valley). Flickering fluorescent lights. Muted, sickly colors. Sense of being watched.
zodiac_guardians: Cosmic magical girl/boy. Star maps, constellations. Glowing armor based on zodiac signs. Space backgrounds, nebulas. Bright, heroic lighting. Anime-inspired visual effects.
sentinel_guide: Spirit animals. Glowing mental threads connecting two people. Futuristic towers. Uniforms. Visual representation of sensory overload (blur, distortion) vs calm (clarity).
omegaverse: Pheromone visualization (colored mist). Neck collars, glands. High-class parties vs primal instincts. Intense, flushed visuals. Atmosphere of desire and dominance.
gourmet_chef: Food porn. Glowing dishes, steam rising. Fresh ingredients. joyful cooking scenes. bright, appetizing lighting. Exaggerated reactions of deliciousness.
ancient_farming: Idyllic pastoral life. Golden wheat fields, green mountains. Wooden tools, simple cottages. Sunlight, seasons. Peaceful, slow-living aesthetic.
time_travel_history: Historical grandeur. Tang/Song dynasty architecture. Hanfu with modern accessories. Contrast between ancient setting and modern behavior. Warm, candlelit atmosphere.
mythology_remix: Eldritch cultivation. Body horror mixed with eastern divinity. Tentacles under robes, extra eyes. Dark, misty mountains. Blood red and ink black palette. Unsettling, nightmare fuel.
silent_bodyguard: Shadowy protector. Dark suits or stealth gear. Always in the background or half-shadow. Stoic expressions. Focus on hands (holding weapons or shielding). Cool, muted tones.
mechanic_romance: Industrial garage. Grease, oil, metal. Blue coveralls, white tank tops. Sparks from welding. Warm, gritty lighting. Tools as props. Raw masculinity.
awkward_genius: Lab romance. White coats, blackboards full of formulas. Messy hair, glasses. cluttered desks. Soft, geeky atmosphere. Blue and white color scheme.
stoic_swordsman: Cold mountain peak. Snow, ice, plum blossoms. White robes, silver sword. Lonely, ascetic atmosphere. Minimalist composition. Sharp, clean lines.
wolf_dog_devotion: Fierce loyalty. Chains, collars (symbolic). Wild eyes, messy hair. Scars. Kneeling poses. Contrast between aggression to world and submission to one. Dark/warm lighting.
